title: (Planet Money, NPR) "We almost had a smartphone in the 90s. Why did it fail?"
abstract: (Planet Money, NPR) "We almost had a smartphone in the 90s. Why did it fail?" may be niche, but it solves its target problem with focus and precision. In the fast-moving AI space, specialized tools...
abstract_zh: 嘿，90年代的小伙伴们，你们还记得那个差点让我们手握智能手机的时代吗？“We almost had a smartphone in the 90s. Why did it fail?” 这个工具就像侦探一样，把时间拨回到过去，找出了手机没上线的背后真相。现在，它就在这里，用它的独门秘籍，让你知道为什么那时的手机只能是手机，不能叫智能手机！
